🪵 Back-logBlog
🚽

Get Paid to Take Breaks

Your employer pays you during bathroom breaks. We just help you keep track — and have a little fun while you're at it.

Track your break earnings, visit friends' bathrooms, unlock achievements like Toilet Emperor. Animal Crossing vibes. Zero shame.

📱 Download on the App StoreRead the Blog

Yes, we actually built an app that pays you to poop.

💸

Track Your Earnings

Your hourly rate ÷ 3600 × break seconds = real money. Back-log does the math so you don't have to feel weird about it.

🏠

Visit Friends' Bathrooms

Social features. See how your breaks stack up. Visit, rate, and unlock each other's bathroom achievements.

🏆

Unlock Achievements

Toilet Emperor. The Deep Thinker. Marathon Runner. Collect them all. Brag at the water cooler.

How It Works

1️⃣

Enter your salary or hourly rate (we don't store it)

2️⃣

Hit start when your break begins

3️⃣

Watch the earnings tick up in real time 💰

4️⃣

Log it. See your all-time lifetime break earnings.

5️⃣

Share with friends. Judge each other. Grow.

The Back-log Blog

Deep dives on bathroom break economics, workplace wellness, and the unhinged science of making work weirder.

© 2026 Back-log. Built with dignity.

We did not consult any HR departments in the making of this app.
